summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India activity concentrates in Colo (269 signals) and Build (18 signals), with notable presence in Compute (3) and Power (9). GCC movements show UAE leading in Colo (5) and Build (8), while Saudi Arabia has strongest policy tailwind (15 regulation items). Whitespace targets active in GCC with no India entity: center3 (GCC; SA), CtrlS (India — note: CtrlS appears in India Entities as CtrlS Datacenters Ltd, so this may be a data inconsistency; per strict DATA, CtrlS is listed under Whitespace as having no India entity, but INDIA ENTITIES shows CtrlS Datacenters Ltd as active — treat as per Whitespace listing for market-entry logic), Khazna (GCC), Ooredoo (GCC). Top India actors by OSINT: Sify Technologies Limited (29 job-postings/facility-presence), CtrlS Datacenters Ltd (18), Nxtra Data Ltd (14).

POLICY READ
India regulation shows 3 items: Notices of Attachment of Bank Accounts and Demat Accounts (AP Nos. 15504-15509 of 2026 dated Jun). No India legislation or analysis signals. GCC policy: Saudi Arabia has 15 regulation items (strongest tailwind), Kuwait has 1 regulation item (companies suspended from trading). India policy items are government-affairs hooks; Saudi Arabia regulation may push players toward India if local constraints arise.

COMMERCIAL READ
India leads in Colo (252 signals) and Build (1 signal). UAE leads in Compute (2 signals). Saudi Arabia and Qatar each have 1 Power signal. India has zero signals in Compute, Cooling, Power, Network layers per Commercial layer×market — but Geo shows India has Compute (3), Power (9), Network (1), Colo (269), Build (18), indicating layered activity. Top momentum: Sify (score 9.29). Top mover: Sify (0.0 score, 0 new signals).

RANKED INDIA OPPORTUNITIES
1. center3; why-now: active in GCC (SA) with no India entity per Whitespace; cross-signal: GCC activity + no India entity = likely India entry; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: Whitespace listing (center3 | GCC; SA | score 52.1), geo=GCC; SA in TOP PROSPECTS.
2. Khazna; why-now: active in GCC with no India entity per Whitespace; cross-signal: GCC activity + no India entity = likely India entry; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: Whitespace listing (Khazna | GCC | score 29.1).
3. Ooredoo; why-now: active in GCC with no India entity per Whitespace; cross-signal: GCC activity + no India entity = likely India entry; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: Whitespace listing (Ooredoo | GCC | score 25.4).
4. Sify; why-now: 1 new signal ≤7d per TOP PROSPECTS; cross-signal: active in India (India Entities: SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED) + rising momentum (Top Prospects score 77.5, Top momentum 9.29) = partnership/govt-affairs target; TAG play: India partnership; evidence: TOP PROSPECTS (Sify | T1 | play=India partnership | score=77.5 | geo=India | why=1 new signals ≤7d | ev=341f0dc0b422, ...), INDIA ENTITIES (SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED | U72050809| active | Tamil Nadu).
5. CtrlS; why-now: recent news 2026-04-06 per TOP PROSPECTS; cross-signal: active in India (per INDIA ENTITIES: CtrlS Datacenters Ltd) + news momentum = partnership/govt-affairs target; TAG play: India partnership; evidence: TOP PROSPECTS (CtrlS | T3 | play=Watch | status=unresolved | score=35.8 | geo=India | why=recent news 2026-04-06 | ev=8031780bae1e, ...), INDIA ENTITIES (CTRLS not explicitly listed — but OSINT Top India actors includes 'CtrlS Datacenters Ltd': 18; treat as active per OSINT and ENTITIES pattern; note: ENTITIES list has 'CTRLS' missing but OSINT confirms activity — use OSINT as proxy for activity).

— Grounding set (companies in sheet): ADANICONNEX PRIVATE LIMITED, AdaniConneX, CtrlS, GOOGLE INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, Khazna, NTT, NTT INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, NXTRA DATA LIMITED, Nxtra, ORACLE INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, Ooredoo, PRINCETON DIGITAL INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, RELIANCE LIMITED, SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED, Sify, TATA COMMUNICATIONS LIMITED, WEB WERKS INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, YOTTA TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED, Yotta, center3
